responsibilities: • plan and manage international audit engagements   • lead audit teams across multiple locations   • ensure compliance with isa and local regula tions   • review audit reports and working papers   • coordinate with overseas clients and regulators   • support cross -border group audits and consolidations
qualifications: • ca with audit leadership experience   • strong knowledge of international auditing standa rds  • team management and client -handling skills
